message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AI takes a turn

actor "Controller" as Controller
participant ": AIController" as AIController

activate Controller
activate AIController

Controller -> AIController : Step()

rect rgb(255, 255, 255)
    group loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AIController -> AIController : HandleRobot(r)
    end
end

rect rgb(255, 255, 255)
    group loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AIController -> AIController : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
end

rect rgb(255, 255, 255)
    group loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AIController -> AIController : HandleUfo(u)
    end
end

AIController --> Controller : 

deactivate AIController
deactivate Controller

@enduml
```
